tools.name: find_user
tools.description: Look up a user (portal customer, portal user or internal agent) by full name.

name.description: Full name of user, e.g., 'Harry Middleton'.

email.description: Unique email address of the user.

role.description: User role assigned from the predefined list.

location_id.description: Unique identifier of the location associated with this record. This value references the primary key of the location in the location table.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

tools.name: find_user_by_email
tools.description: Look up a user (portal customer, portal user or internal agent) by email address.

role.description: User role assigned from the predefined list.

location_id.description: Foreign key referencing the user's location.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

tools.name: find_account
tools.description: Retrieve an account by its exact name. Account is a company or organization that has a relationship with the business.

name.description: Exact account name, e.g., 'Wood and Sons'.

account_id.description: Unique identifier of the account.

email_domain.description: Email domain associated with the account, if any.

active.description: Whether the account is active.

tools.name: find_contact_by_portal_user
tools.description: Find the contact record using the portal user associated with it. Portal user is a type of user that represents a customer accessing the support portal. Portal user is a user with role 'customer' in the user table.

portal_user_id.description: Unique identifier of the portal user associated with this record. This value references the primary key of the user in the User table.

account_id.description: ID of the account associated with this contact.

portal_user_id.description: Unique identifier of the portal user associated with this record. This value references the primary key of the user in the User table.

active.description: Whether the contact record is active.

tools.name: find_product
tools.description: Look up a product by its exact name. Product represents an item or service offered by the company.

tools.name: find_product_by_id
tools.description: Retrieve a product by product ID. Product represents an item or service offered by the company. Each Product has a unique identifier called product_id.

tools.name: find_installed_product_by_serial
tools.description: Retrieve an installed product by its serial number. Installed Product represents a specific instance of a product that has been installed for a customer. The serial number is a unique identifier assigned to each installed product.

installed_product_id.description: Unique identifier of the installed product.

account_id.description: Account to which this installed product belongs.

location_id.description: Location of the installed product, if specified.

serial_number.description: Exact serial number of the installed product.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the installed product.

warranty_end.description: Warranty expiration date of the installed product, if available.

tools.name: find_location
tools.description: Look up a location (site/campus) by exact given name for it. Location represents a physical site or campus or user's location where services or products are installed or the user resides.

location_id.description: Unique identifier of the location.

city.description: City in which the location is situated.

active.description: Whether the location is active.

tools.name: find_user_group
tools.description: Retrieve a user group by exact name. User Group represents a collection of users grouped together for assignment or organizational purposes.

name.description: Exact name of the user group (unique).

group_id.description: Unique identifier of the user group.

name.description: Exact name of the user group (unique).

active.description: Whether the user group is active.

tools.name: check_user_membership
tools.description: Verify that a user is a member of a specific user group. User Group represents a collection of users grouped together for assignment or organizational purposes.

group_id.description: User group's unique id to check

exists.description: Indicates whether the user is a member of the specified group.

member_id.description: The member_id of the membership record if it exists, otherwise null.

tools.name: assign_case_to_user
tools.description: Assign an existing case to a specific user (agent). Case represents a support ticket or issue that needs to be resolved. The assigned user takes care of the lifecycle of the case to its closure.

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the case to be assigned.

assigned_to_user_id.description: Unique identifier of the user (agent) to assign the case to. It is a user who is assigned to handle the case. The user has record in the user table with at least role 'agent'.

assigned_to.description: The user_id of the agent the case was assigned to. It is a user who is assigned to handle the case. The user has record in the user table with at least role 'agent'.

assigned_at.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the case assignment was updated.

tools.name: set_case_assignment_group
tools.description: Set or change the assignment group for a case. Setting the assignment group helps route the case to the appropriate team for handling.

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the case to update.

assignment_group_id.description: Unique identifier of the assignment group to set.
The ID of the assignment group that the case was set to.

set_at.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the assignment group update occurred.

tools.name: list_users
tools.description: List users with optional filters. None of the filters are mandatory. If no filters are provided, all users will be returned.

email.description: Filter by user email address (exact match) (unique).

role.description: Filter by user role (admin, agent, manager, or customer).

location_id.description: Filter by location identifier.

active.description: Filter by active status (true = active, false = inactive).

created_after.description: Return only users created after this timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

created_before.description: Return only users created before this timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

phone.description: Phone number of the user, if provided.

location_id.description: Identifier of the user's location.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the user record was created.

tools.name: list_user_groups
tools.description: List user groups with optional filters.

name.description: Filter by group name (exact match, unique).

active.description: Filter by active status (true = active, false = inactive).

type.description: Filter by group type (support, backoffice, field, vendor).

created_after.description: Return only groups created after this timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

created_before.description: Return only groups created before this timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

group_id.description: Unique identifier of the user group.

active.description: Whether the user group is active.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the group was created.

tools.name: list_group_members
tools.description: List user group members with optional filters. Combination of group_id and user_id is unique.

created_after.description: Return only memberships created after this timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

created_before.description: Return only memberships created before this timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

member_id.description: Unique identifier of the group membership record.

group_id.description: ID of the user group this membership belongs to.

user_id.description: ID of the user who is a member of the group.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the membership record was created.

tools.name: get_accounts
tools.description: List accounts with optional filters. All the inputs are optional, not providing any filter will return all accounts. Account represents a business entity or organization.

account_id.description: Filter by unique account identifier.

name.description: Filter by account name (e.g., 'Acme Systems') (unique). Name of the company/organization associated with the account.

email_domain.description: Filter by account email domain (e.g., 'acme.com'). it is the domain part of email addresses associated with the account or the website.

account_types.description: Filter by one or more account types (customer, partner, internal).

active.description: Filter by active status (true = active, false = inactive).

created_after.description: Return only accounts created after this timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

created_before.description: Return only accounts created before this timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

account_id.description: Unique identifier of the account.

name.description: Name of the account. It represents the company or organization associated with the account.

email_domain.description: Email domain associated with the account, if provided. It is the domain part of email addresses linked to the account or the company's website.

active.description: Whether the account is active.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the account was created.

tools.name: find_contacts
tools.description: Find contacts with optional filters.All the inputs are optional, not providing any filter will return all accounts. Contact represents an individual associated with an account or a point of contact.

account_id.description: ID of the account this contact belongs to.

portal_user_id.description: Unique identifier of the portal user associated with this record. This value references the primary key of the user in the User table.

active.description: Whether the contact is currently active.

is_primary.description: True if this is the primary contact for the account.

created_after.description: Filter for contacts created after this timestamp (ISO format).

created_before.description: Filter for contacts created before this timestamp (ISO format).

account_id.description: Identifier of the account this contact belongs to.

portal_user_id.description: Unique identifier of the portal user associated with this record. This value references the primary key of the user in the User table.

active.description: Indicates whether the contact is active.

is_primary.description: True if this contact is the primary contact for its account.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the contact record was created.

tools.name: find_locations
tools.description: Find locations with optional filters. All the inputs are optional, not providing any filter will return all locations. Location represents a physical site or campus or user's location where services or products are installed or the user resides.

location_id.description: Unique identifier of the location.

active.description: Whether the location is currently active.

city.description: City where the location is situated.

country.description: Country where the location is situated.

created_before.description: Filter for locations created before this timestamp (ISO format).

created_after.description: Filter for locations created after this timestamp (ISO format).

location_id.description: Unique identifier of the location.

plot_no.description: Plot number of the location, if available.

street.description: Street address of the location, if available.

city.description: City where the location is situated.

country.description: Country where the location is situated.

active.description: Whether the location is active.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the location was created.

tools.name: find_products
tools.description: Find products with optional filters. All the inputs are optional, not providing any filter will return all products.

created_before.description: Filter for products created before this timestamp (ISO format).

created_after.description: Filter for products created after this timestamp (ISO format).

product_price.description: Price of the product, if defined.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the product was created.

tools.name: installed_product_warranties_ended_count
tools.description: Count installed products whose warranty ended on or before the date provided, optionally filtered.

account_id.description: Filter by owning account ID.

on_date.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD). Count warranties that ended on or before this date.

ended_count.description: Number of installed products whose warranty ended on or before the specified on_date, after applying any provided filters.

tools.name: avg_installed_per_account_by_status
tools.description: Average installed products per account for each status (optionally filter by product/location).

location_id.description: Filter by location/site ID.

account_id.description: Filter by account ID.
Account ID for which the installed product count was calculated.

status.description: Installed product status category for the aggregated result.

avg_installed_per_account.description: Average number of installed products per account for this status category.

tools.name: count_installed_product_by_status
tools.description: Count installed products grouped by status with optional filters.

account_id.description: Filter by owning account ID.

location_id.description: Filter by location/site ID.

count.description: Number of installed products for this status category.

tools.name: retrieve_installed_products
tools.description: Retrieve installed products with rich filters. All filters are optional. If no filters are provided, all installed products will be returned. Installed products are items that have been deployed or set up for use at specific locations or accounts.

location_id.description: Filter by location/site ID. Unique identifier which relates to the location table record.

account_id.description: Filter by account ID. Unique identifier which relates to the account table record. An account represents a business entity or organization.

product_id.description: Filter by product ID. Unique identifier which relates to the product table record.

serial_number.description: Exact serial number of the installed product. Unique identifier assigned to the product by the manufacturer.

status.description: Current status of the installed product.

created_before.description: Return products created before this date (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

created_after.description: Return products created after this date (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

items.description: Installed product record. An installed product is an item that has been deployed or set up for use at a specific location or account.

account_id.description: Associated account ID.

location_id.description: Associated location/site ID. Unique identifier which relates to the location table record.

serial_number.description: Serial number of the installed product. Unique identifier assigned to the product by the manufacturer.

status.description: Current status of the installed product.

sys_created_on.description: Record creation timestamp.

tools.name: count_contract_by_status
tools.description: Count contracts grouped by status; optional filters. All inputs are optional; not providing any filter will return counts for all contracts. A contract represents a formal agreement between two or more parties.

account_id.description: Filter contracts by the owning account’s unique ID. An account represents a business entity or organization.

contract_type.description: Filter by type of contract (support, warranty, or subscription).

count.description: Number of contracts for this status category.

tools.name: avg_contracts_per_account_by_status
tools.description: Average number of contracts per account for each status. Optionally filter by contract type.

contract_type.description: Optional filter to calculate averages only for a specific contract type.

avg_contracts_per_account.description: Average number of contracts per account for this status.

tools.name: find_contracts
tools.description: Find contracts with multiple filters including price range. All inputs are optional; not providing any filter will return all contracts. A contract represents a formal agreement between two or more parties.

status.description: Filter contracts by their current status.

account_id.description: Filter contracts by the owning account’s ID. An account represents a business entity or organization.

contract_price.description: Exact price of the contract in system currency.

contract_price_range_start.description: Lower bound of contract price range filter.

contract_price_range_end.description: Upper bound of contract price range filter.

created_before.description: Find contracts created before this timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

created_after.description: Find contracts created after this timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

account_id.description: Identifier of the owning account. An account represents a business entity or organization.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the contract was created.

tools.name: total_sum_of_max_cases_per_support_level
tools.description: Sum max_cases_per_month from entitlements (optionally for one support_level).

support_level.description: Support level to filter entitlements. Options: standard, premium, enterprise.
Support level used for the aggregation (or 'all' if no filter was applied).

sum.description: Total sum of max_cases_per_month for the selected support level.

tools.name: find_entitlements
tools.description: Find entitlements with filters. All inputs are optional; not providing any filter will return all entitlements. An entitlement represents a customer's right to receive specific services or support based on their agreement.

account_id.description: Filter entitlements by associated account ID. An account represents a business entity or organization.

product_id.description: Filter entitlements by product ID. Unique identifier which relates to the product table record.

contract_id.description: Filter entitlements by contract ID. Unique identifier which relates to the contract table record.

support_level.description: Support level associated with the entitlement.

coverage_hours.description: Coverage hours offered under the entitlement (8x5, 12x6, 24x7).

max_cases_per_month.description: Maximum number of support cases allowed per month under this entitlement.

active.description: Filter by entitlement status (true = active, false = inactive).

created_before.description: Return entitlements created before this date (YYYY-MM-DD format).

created_after.description: Return entitlements created after this date (YYYY-MM-DD format).

account_id.description: Account ID associated with this entitlement. An account represents a business entity or organization.

product_id.description: Product ID linked to this entitlement (null means all products).

contract_id.description: Contract ID linked to this entitlement.

support_level.description: Support level assigned to this entitlement.

coverage_hours.description: Coverage hours provided under this entitlement.

max_cases_per_month.description: Maximum number of support cases allowed per month.

active.description: Whether the entitlement is active (true) or inactive (false).

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the entitlement was created.

tools.name: total_sum_of_target_mins_per_priority
tools.description: Sum target_mins over SLA definitions (optionally for one priority).

priority.description: Optional filter: restrict the sum to SLA definitions that apply to this priority level.
Priority level used for the sum calculation, or 'all' if no priority filter was applied.

sum.description: Total sum of target_mins for the selected priority level.

tools.name: find_sla_definitions
tools.description: Find SLA definitions with filters. All inputs are optional; not providing any filter will return all SLA definitions. An SLA definition outlines the expected service levels for response and resolution times based on case priority.

sla_def_id.description: Unique identifier of the SLA definition.

name.description: Name of the SLA definition (e.g., 'SLA Response - Critical').

metric.description: SLA metric type. 'response' = first response SLA, 'resolution' = issue resolution SLA.

target_mins.description: Target duration for the SLA in minutes.

pause_on_pending.description: Whether the SLA timer pauses when the case is in a pending state.

applies_to_priority.description: Priority level this SLA definition applies to.

active.description: Whether the SLA definition is active (true) or inactive (false).

created_before.description: Return SLA definitions created before this date (YYYY-MM-DD format).

created_after.description: Return SLA definitions created after this date (YYYY-MM-DD format).

sla_def_id.description: Unique identifier of the SLA definition.

target_mins.description: Target duration for the SLA in minutes.

pause_on_pending.description: Whether the SLA pauses when the case is pending.

applies_to_priority.description: Priority that this SLA definition applies to.

active.description: Whether this SLA definition is active (true) or inactive (false).

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the SLA definition was created.

tools.name: average_target_mins_per_priority
tools.description: Average target_mins grouped by applies_to_priority; optionally limit to a priority list.

priority_list.description: Optional list of priorities. If provided, averages are calculated only for these priority levels.

priority.description: Priority level for which the average target minutes were calculated.

avg_target_mins.description: Average target_mins value for this priority.

tools.name: get_cases_assigned_to
tools.description: List cases filtered by assignment_group_id and/or assigned_to.

assignment_group_id.description: Filter by the assignment group responsible for the case.

assigned_to.description: Filter by the specific user ID the case is assigned to.

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the case.

account_id.description: Account ID associated with the case.

contact_id.description: Contact ID who raised the case.

product_id.description: Product ID related to the case.

installed_product_id.description: Installed product ID associated with the case.

channel.description: Channel through which the case was raised.

short_description.description: Short description summarizing the case issue.

assignment_group_id.description: Assignment group ID responsible for the case.

assigned_to.description: User ID assigned to the case.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the case record was created.

tools.name: get_average_case_reopen_count
tools.description: Average of reopen_count on cases (optional filters).

channel.description: Channel through which the case was created.

avg_reopen_count.description: Average value of the reopen_count field for the selected cases.

tools.name: get_count_of_cases_priority_wise
tools.description: Count cases per priority (or for one priority).

priority.description: Optional filter to count cases only for this priority level.
Priority level for which the case count is calculated.

count.description: Number of cases for the specified priority.

tools.name: count_case_for_assignment_group
tools.description: Count cases for an assignment group with optional filters.

assignment_group_id.description: Assignment group ID to filter cases.

channel.description: Optional filter by channel.

account_id.description: Filter cases by account ID.

assignment_group_id.description: The assignment group ID for which the case count was calculated.

count.description: Number of cases matching the provided filters for the given assignment group.

tools.name: count_case_by_state
tools.description: Count cases grouped by state with optional filters.

account_id.description: Filter cases by account ID.

channel.description: Filter by channel.

state.description: State of the case for which the count is calculated.

count.description: Number of cases in this state that match the applied filters.

tools.name: avg_reopen_count_for_assignment_group
tools.description: Average reopen_count for cases in an assignment group (optional filters).

assignment_group_id.description: Assignment group ID to filter cases.

channel.description: Optional filter by channel.

assignment_group_id.description: The assignment group ID for which the average reopen count was calculated.

avg_reopen_count.description: Average reopen_count value for cases matching the provided filters.

tools.name: search_cases
tools.description: Search cases with rich filters and date bounds on sys_created_on. All inputs are optional; not providing any filter will return all cases. A case represents a customer-reported issue or request that requires tracking and resolution.

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the case.

account_id.description: Filter by account ID. An account represents a business entity or organization.

product_id.description: Filter by product ID. Unique identifier which relates to the product table record.

installed_product_id.description: Filter by installed product ID. Unique identifier which relates to the installed product table record.

channel.description: Channel through which the case was communicated/created.

reopen_count.description: Filter by number of times the case was reopened.

closed_on.description: Filter cases closed on a specific date (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

created_before.description: Return cases created before this date (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

created_after.description: Return cases created after this date (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the case.

account_id.description: Account associated with the case.

installed_product_id.description: Installed product linked to the case.

channel.description: Channel through which the case was created.

short_description.description: Short description summarizing the case issue.

escalation.description: Indicates whether the case is escalated.

reopen_count.description: Number of times the case has been reopened.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the case was created.

sys_updated_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the case was last updated.

closed_on.description: Date/time when the case was closed.

assignment_group_id.description: Assignment group responsible for handling the case.

assigned_to.description: User assigned to work on the case.

tools.name: find_case_slas
tools.description: Find case_sla rows with flexible filters. All inputs are optional; not providing any filter will return all case_sla records. A case_sla record tracks the SLA status for a specific case based on the applied SLA definition.

case_sla_id.description: Unique identifier of the case_sla record.

case_id.description: ID of the case linked to this SLA record.

sla_def_id.description: ID of the SLA definition applied to the case.

stage.description: Current stage of the SLA tracking.

start_time.description: Timestamp when SLA tracking started (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

has_breached.description: Indicates whether the SLA was breached (true/false).

completed_time.description: Timestamp when SLA was completed, if applicable.

case_sla_id.description: Unique identifier of the case_sla record.

case_id.description: ID of the case associated with this SLA record.

sla_def_id.description: ID of the SLA definition applied to the case.

start_time.description: Timestamp when SLA tracking started (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).

breach_time.description: Expected or actual SLA breach timestamp.

has_breached.description: Indicates whether the SLA has been breached (true/false).

completed_time.description: Timestamp when SLA tracking was completed, if applicable.

tools.name: find_stage_wise_breached_case_sla_counts
tools.description: Stage-wise counts of breached case_sla rows.

stage.description: Stage to filter SLA breach counts.

in_progress.description: Number of breached case_sla records in the 'in_progress' stage.

paused.description: Number of breached case_sla records in the 'paused' stage.

completed.description: Number of breached case_sla records in the 'completed' stage.

canceled.description: Number of breached case_sla records in the 'canceled' stage.

additionalProperties.description: Count of breached SLA records for a dynamically returned stage.

tools.name: find_interactions
tools.description: Find interactions with rich time filters on started_at/ended_at and sys_created_on. All inputs are optional; not providing any filter will return all interactions. An interaction represents a communication event between a customer and support, such as a phone call, email, chat session, or social media message that is logged.

channel.description: Filter by channel.

account_id.description: Filter by account ID. An account represents a business entity or organization.

contact_id.description: Filter by contact ID. A contact is an individual associated with an account.

case_id.description: Filter by case ID. A case represents a customer-reported issue or request.

interacted_user.description: Filter by user who interacted. This is the agent or user who handled the interaction.

started_at.description: Exact match for interaction start time.

ended_at.description: Exact match for interaction end time.

created_before.description: Find interactions created before this timestamp.

created_after.description: Find interactions created after this timestamp.

started_at_before.description: Find interactions started before this timestamp.

started_at_after.description: Find interactions started after this timestamp.

ended_at_before.description: Find interactions ended before this timestamp.

ended_at_after.description: Find interactions ended after this timestamp.

channel.description: Channel over which the interaction took place.

account_id.description: Account ID associated with the interaction, if any.

contact_id.description: Contact ID associated with the interaction, if any.

case_id.description: Case ID linked to this interaction, if applicable.

interacted_user.description: User ID of the agent or user who handled the interaction.

started_at.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the interaction started.

ended_at.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the interaction ended, if available.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the interaction record was created.

tools.name: count_interaction_by_status
tools.description: Count interactions grouped by status with optional filters.

account_id.description: Filter by account ID.

case_id.description: Filter by case ID.

channel.description: Filter by channel.

status.description: Interaction status for which the count is calculated.

count.description: Number of interactions matching this status and the applied filters.

tools.name: avg_interactions_per_case_by_status
tools.description: Average interactions per case, grouped by interaction status; optional filters.

account_id.description: Filter by account ID.

channel.description: Filter by channel.

status.description: Interaction status for which the average interactions per case is calculated.

avg_interactions_per_case.description: Average number of interactions per case for this status, based on matching records.

tools.name: get_channel_wise_case_count
tools.description: Count cases per channel; if channel provided returns only that channel's count.

channel.description: Optional filter to count cases only for this channel.

web.description: Count of cases created through the 'web' channel.

email.description: Count of cases created through the 'email' channel.

phone.description: Count of cases created through the 'phone' channel.

chat.description: Count of cases created through the 'chat' channel.

social.description: Count of cases created through the 'social' channel.

alert.description: Count of cases created through the 'alert' channel.

community.description: Count of cases created through the 'community' channel.

tools.name: retrieve_knowledge
tools.description: Retrieve knowledge articles with full-text search on title/body and structured filters. All inputs are optional; not providing any filter will return all knowledge articles. A knowledge article is a documented piece of information that provides solutions, answers, or guidance on specific topics to help users resolve issues or learn about products and services.

search_text.description: Full-text search across article title and body. Free form search.

knowledge_id.description: Filter by unique knowledge article ID.

visibility.description: Filter by article visibility. Internal for staff, external for customers/public.

owner_id.description: Filter by user ID of the article owner. User who authored the article.

created_before.description: Retrieve articles created before this timestamp.

created_after.description: Retrieve articles created after this timestamp.

limit.description: Limit the number of articles returned.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge article.

kb_number.description: Knowledge base article number (system-generated unique reference, e.g., KB000001).

visibility.description: Visibility of the article: internal staff or external customers.

product_id.description: ID of the related product associated with this article, if any.

owner_id.description: User ID of the article owner/author.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the knowledge article record was created.

score.description: Relevance score for the article when full-text search is used. Higher values indicate better matches.

tools.name: find_case_knowledge_linkages
tools.description: Find case-knowledge linkages (case_knowledge). Combination of case id and knowledge id is unique. All inputs are optional; not providing any filter will return all case_knowledge linkages. A case_knowledge linkage represents the association between a specific case and a knowledge article, indicating how the article was utilized in relation to the case, such as being suggested, applied, or used as a resolution.

case_kb_id.description: Unique identifier of the case_knowledge linkage.

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the case.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge article.

used_as.description: Filter by usage context: suggested, applied, or resolution.

case_kb_id.description: Unique identifier of the case_knowledge linkage record.

case_id.description: ID of the case associated with the knowledge article.

knowledge_id.description: ID of the linked knowledge article.

used_as.description: How the knowledge article was used for the case (suggested, applied, or resolution).

tools.name: find_notifications
tools.description: Find notifications with flexible filters. All inputs are optional; not providing any filter will return all notifications. A notification represents a message or alert sent to users or stakeholders to inform them about important updates, events, or actions related to cases, knowledge articles, or other system activities.

case_id.description: Case ID associated with this notification, if any.

knowledge_id.description: Knowledge article ID linked to this notification, if any.

email.description: Recipient email address for the notification.

type.description: Type of notification, e.g., report, update, alert, reminder, solution_proposal, next_steps, or other.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the notification was created.

case_id.description: Case ID associated with this notification.

knowledge_id.description: Knowledge article ID linked to this notification, if any.

email.description: Recipient email address for the notification.

type.description: Type of notification (report, update, alert, reminder, solution_proposal, next_steps, or other).

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the notification record was created.

tools.name: count_notifications_by_status
tools.description: Count notifications grouped by status; if status provided returns only that status.

status.description: Optional filter to count only notifications with this status.
Notification delivery status for which the count is calculated.

count.description: Number of notifications with this status.

tools.name: count_notifications_by_case
tools.description: Count notifications for a given case; if case_id omitted, returns total count.

case_id.description: Optional case ID to filter notifications by case.

count.description: Number of notifications matching the case filter (or total notifications if no case_id was provided).

tools.name: avg_notifications_by_case
tools.description: Average notifications per case; if case given, returns that case's count as a float.

case.description: Optional case ID; if provided, returns notification count for that case.

avg_count.description: Average number of notifications per case, or the notification count for a specific case when a case ID is provided.

tools.name: count_notifications_by_type
tools.description: Count notifications grouped by type; optionally limit to a list of types.

type.description: Optional list of notification types to filter counts.
Notification type for which the count is calculated.

count.description: Number of notifications for this type.

tools.name: add_new_user
tools.description: Create a new user record. A user represents an individual who interacts with the system, such as support agents, managers, or customers.

email.description: Unique email address of the user.

phone.description: Contact phone number of the user.

location_id.description: Associated location identifier. Optional. Location where user resides/works.

active.description: Whether the user is active (true) or inactive (false).

user_id.description: Unique identifier of the newly created user.

email.description: Unique email address of the user.

phone.description: Contact phone number of the user, if provided.

location_id.description: Associated location identifier, if provided.

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the user was created.

sys_updated_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the user record was last updated.

tools.name: update_user_details
tools.description: Update an existing user (partial updates supported). A user represents an individual who interacts with the system, such as support agents, managers, or customers.

user_id.description: Unique identifier of the user to update.

email.description: New email address for the user.

first_name.description: Updated first name of the user.

last_name.description: Updated last name of the user.

active.description: Updated active status (true = active, false = inactive).

location_id.description: Updated location identifier.
Identifier of the user's location, if provided.

active.description: Whether the user account is active.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the user was created.

sys_updated_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the user record was last updated.

tools.name: add_new_user_group
tools.description: Create a user group. A user group is a collection of users who share similar roles, responsibilities, or access permissions within the system, allowing for efficient management and assignment of tasks or cases.

type.description: Type of the user group (support, backoffice, field, vendor).

active.description: Whether the group is active (true) or inactive (false).

group_id.description: Unique identifier of the user group.

active.description: Whether the user group is active.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the group was created.

sys_updated_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the group record was last updated.

tools.name: update_user_group
tools.description: Update a user group (partial updates supported). A user group is a collection of users who share similar roles, responsibilities, or access permissions within the system, allowing for efficient management and assignment of tasks or cases.

group_id.description: Unique identifier of the group to update.

active.description: Updated active status (true = active, false = inactive).

group_id.description: Unique identifier of the user group.

tools.description: Add a user to a group. Combination of group_id and user_id should be unique.

member_id.description: Unique identifier of the newly created group membership record.

user_id.description: Identifier of the user who was added to the group.

tools.name: remove_group_membership
tools.description: Remove a membership by member_id or by (group_id, user_id).

member_id.description: Unique identifier of the membership to remove.

group_id.description: Group identifier (used with user_id if member_id is not provided).

user_id.description: User identifier (used with group_id if member_id is not provided).

deleted.description: Number of membership records deleted (0 or 1).

tools.name: create_new_account

active.description: Whether the account is active (true) or inactive (false).

is_primary.description: Set to true if this contact should be the account's primary contact.

account_id.description: ID of the account this contact belongs to.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the contact was created.

tools.name: link_new_case_sla

tools.name: update_interaction
tools.description: Update an interaction (partial updates). An interaction represents a communication or engagement with a customer through various channels.

interaction_id.description: Unique identifier of the interaction to update.

channel.description: Update the interaction channel.

account_id.description: Update the related account ID.

case_id.description: Update the related case ID.

interacted_user.description: Update the user ID of the interacting person.

channel.description: Channel through which the interaction occurred.

account_id.description: ID of the related account, if applicable.

contact_id.description: ID of the related contact, if applicable.

case_id.description: ID of the related case, if applicable.

interacted_user.description: User ID of the agent or person who handled the interaction.

started_at.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the interaction started.

ended_at.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the interaction ended, if applicable.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the interaction record was created.

tools.name: create_knowledge
tools.description: Create a knowledge article (kb_number is auto-generated). Returns the created knowledge article record. A knowledge article is a documented piece of information that provides solutions, guidelines, or answers to common questions for customers or internal staff.

visibility.description: Who can view the article: internal staff or external customers.

product_id.description: ID of the related product, if applicable.

owner_id.description: User ID of the article owner/author.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge article.

kb_number.description: System-generated unique knowledge article number (e.g., KB000001).

body.description: Full body/content of the knowledge article.

visibility.description: Visibility of the article: internal staff or external customers.

product_id.description: ID of the related product, if applicable.

owner_id.description: User ID of the article owner/author.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the knowledge article record was created.

sys_updated_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the knowledge article record was last updated.

tools.name: update_knowledge
tools.description: Update a knowledge article (partial updates allowed). A knowledge article is a documented piece of information that provides solutions, guidelines, or answers to common questions for customers or internal staff.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge article to update.

title.description: Update the title of the article.

state.description: Update the lifecycle state of the article.

visibility.description: Update the visibility of the article.

owner_id.description: Update the user ID of the article owner/author.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the updated knowledge article.

body.description: Full body/content of the knowledge article.

visibility.description: Visibility of the article: internal staff or external customers.

product_id.description: ID of the related product associated with this article.

owner_id.description: User ID of the article owner/author.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the knowledge article was originally created.

sys_updated_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the knowledge article was last updated.

tools.name: link_case_knowledge
tools.description: Link a case to a knowledge article. A case_knowledge linkage associates a support case with a specific knowledge article, indicating how the article is relevant to the case.

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the case being linked.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge article to link.

used_as.description: Purpose of the knowledge article in context of the case: suggested, applied, or used as resolution.

case_kb_id.description: Unique identifier of the case_knowledge linkage record.

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the linked case.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the linked knowledge article.

used_as.description: Purpose of the knowledge article in the context of the case (suggested, applied, or resolution).

tools.name: updated_linked_case_knowledge
tools.description: Update a case_knowledge linkage (partial updates). A case_knowledge linkage associates a support case with a specific knowledge article, indicating how the article is relevant to the case.

case_kb_id.description: Unique identifier of the case_knowledge linkage record.

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the linked case.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the linked knowledge article.

case_kb_id.description: Unique identifier of the case_knowledge linkage record.

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the linked case.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the linked knowledge article.

used_as.description: Current purpose of the knowledge article in the context of the case.

tools.name: delete_case_knowledge_linkages
tools.description: Delete case_knowledge rows that match filters (at least one filter required).

case_kb_id.description: Unique identifier of the case_knowledge linkage.

case_id.description: Unique identifier of the case.

knowledge_id.description: Unique identifier of the knowledge article.

deleted.description: Number of case_knowledge linkage records deleted based on the provided filters.

tools.name: send_notification
tools.description: Create a notification for a case (optionally tied to knowledge). Returns the created notification record. A notification represents a message sent to a customer or user regarding updates, alerts, or information related to a support case.

case_id.description: Case ID this notification is related to.

knowledge_id.description: Optional knowledge article ID linked to this notification.

email.description: Recipient email address of the notification.

notification_id.description: Unique ID of the created notification record.

case_id.description: Case ID this notification is related to.

knowledge_id.description: Knowledge article ID linked to this notification, if any.

email.description: Recipient email address of the notification.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the notification record was created.

tools.name: update_notification
tools.description: Update an existing notification (partial updates). A notification represents a message sent to a customer or user regarding updates, alerts, or information related to a support case.

notification_id.description: Unique ID of the notification to update.

case_id.description: Case ID associated with this notification.

knowledge_id.description: Knowledge article ID linked to this notification.

email.description: Recipient email address for the notification.

notification_id.description: Unique ID of the updated notification record.

case_id.description: Case ID associated with this notification.

knowledge_id.description: Knowledge article ID linked to this notification, if any.

email.description: Recipient email address of the notification.

sys_created_on.description: Timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) when the notification record was created.

tools.name: delete_notifications
tools.description: Delete notifications by filters (at least one required). Supports created_before/after.

notification_id.description: Unique ID of the notification to delete.

case_id.description: Case ID filter for deleting notifications.

knowledge_id.description: Knowledge article ID filter for deleting notifications.

email.description: Recipient email filter for deleting notifications.

status.description: Delete only notifications with this delivery status.

sys_created_on.description: Exact creation timestamp filter.

created_before.description: Delete notifications created before this date.

created_after.description: Delete notifications created after this date.

deleted.description: Number of notification records deleted based on the provided filters.
